hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */psy-lehrprojekt-backend-main/*.php) if [ -x ./psy-lehrprojekt-backend-main/vendor/bin/sail ] && docker ps --filter "name=laravel.test" --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then rel="${f#*psy-lehrprojekt-backend-main/}"; (cd psy-lehrprojekt-backend-main && ./vendor/bin/sail exec -T laravel.test ./vendor/bin/pint "$rel") >/dev/null 2>&1; fi ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
